message:
feat(random): implement NumPy-compatible BTPE binomial sampling algorithm

Add BinomialCache struct matching NumPy's binomial_t for precomputed
parameters. Implement the BTPE (Binomial, Triangle, Parallelogram,
Exponential) rejection algorithm for large n*min(p,q) >= 10 cases,
falling back to inverse-CDF for small parameters. This replaces the
simpler Bernoulli trial loop which diverged from NumPy's output for
large n values.

Update conformance expected values for distributions that depend on
binomial internals. Un-ignore the oracle_binomial test now that the
BTPE algorithm matches NumPy's sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
